subcodes.first_line: There is, and hath ever been, no doubt that the Ancient Lord created the peoples of the world for the knowledge of His Own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکی نبوده و نیست که مالک قدم اهل عالم را لاجل معرفت خود خلق فرموده و حدیث
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @Manifestation of God the only route to knowledge of God
